message:
test(workflows): add 18 unit tests for runner.rs result types and config

Tests cover: WorkflowStartResult predicates (is_started, is_locked, execution_id),
WorkflowExecutionResult predicates (is_completed, is_aborted, execution_id),
WorkflowRunnerConfig defaults, AbortResult serialization with skip_serializing_if,
serde roundtrips for all WorkflowStartResult and WorkflowExecutionResult variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
